markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, streamline reviews, and plan new lead-gen assets.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Lead-Gen Strategy:** To offset a light event quarter, the team will create 3-4 gated white papers. These will repurpose blog content to generate leads, focusing on "agentic physical security" to build the new category.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [**Review Process Streamlined:** To unblock content production, Alberto approved a new process: GrowthX will pre-assign reviewers (50% Atul, 30% Mauricio, 20% Alberto), and idea approvals will happen live in syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** The live review session approved several blog ideas, moving them to "In Production" and unblocking the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Performance:** KPIs are growing slowly due to low publication volume; the new strategy aims to accelerate this.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Blockers

  - [KPIs show slow growth, a direct result of low publication volume.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [The primary blocker is a slow review process, which delays content production.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Solution:** Streamline the review process to increase publication velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### New Review Process

  - [**Live Idea Approvals:** Ideas will be reviewed and approved live during syncs to accelerate the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Pre-Assignment:** GrowthX will pre-assign reviewers for ideas and articles, following Alberto's rubric:](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Atul: 50%](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Mauricio: 30%](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Alberto: 20% (for competitive/vendor-focused topics)](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Reminders:** Automated email/Slack reminders will be set for pending reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### Live Idea Review

  - [A live review session approved several ideas, moving them to "In Production."](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Key Decision:** The keyword "predictive" was changed to "proactive" to align with Ambient's brand messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### New Lead-Gen Strategy: White Papers

  - [**Goal:** Create 3-4 gated white papers to generate leads, compensating for a light event quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Content Source:** Repurpose existing blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [**Proposed Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [A general "How to implement agentic physical security" guide.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Vertical-specific guides (Education, Healthcare, Energy).](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Title Strategy:** Use "agentic physical security" to build the new category, as it's seen as fresher and more engaging than "AI in physical security."](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Promotion:** Ambient will create landing pages and promote the assets via ads and email marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [Pre-assign reviewers for all new ideas and articles.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [Create a proposal for the 3-4 white papers.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [**Ambient:**](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [Create landing pages for the new white papers.](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [Set up automated review reminders (email/Slack).](https://fathom.video/share/fdUnm6HxyvGvByzKs1zP8JnUTR5KbTT8?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
